title: ellipanthus tomentosus
intro: Ellipanthus tomentosus, also known as the hairy ellipanthus or hairy ellipanthe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Ellipanthus tomentosus can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in traditional medicine to create extracts and tinctures.
